blocks.text: NeuroData: An Explanation
blocks.textWithoutLinks: NeuroData: An Explanation

blocks.text: In modern science, breakthroughs often occur at the intersection of multiple disciplines. NeuroData, a pioneering, innovative MSc in Brain and Data Science, will create impact through multidisciplinary research and educational innovation.
blocks.textWithoutLinks: In modern science, breakthroughs often occur at the intersection of multiple disciplines. NeuroData, a pioneering, innovative MSc in Brain and Data Science, will create impact through multidisciplinary research and educational innovation.

blocks.text: This holistic approach to students’ training will enable them to forge new mindsets and approaches while increasing individual contributions to a knowledge-based economy and society. The possibilities for ground-breaking, cutting-edge discoveries are enormous.
blocks.textWithoutLinks: This holistic approach to students’ training will enable them to forge new mindsets and approaches while increasing individual contributions to a knowledge-based economy and society. The possibilities for ground-breaking, cutting-edge discoveries are enormous.

blocks.text: The integrated multidisciplinary brain and data science curriculum will cultivate researchers with in-depth knowledge in both fields.
blocks.textWithoutLinks: The integrated multidisciplinary brain and data science curriculum will cultivate researchers with in-depth knowledge in both fields.

blocks.text: Programme Overview
blocks.textWithoutLinks: Programme Overview

blocks.text: The first year of the programme is spent at Bar-Ilan University. All students from multidisciplinary backgrounds will receive essential training in neuroscience and data science tailored according to their undergraduate studies and designed to bring all students to the same level in both subjects. During this year, students will be integrated into the vibrant teaching and research environment of the Gonda Multidisciplinary Brain Research Center. The first year in Israel is mandatory for all students.
blocks.textWithoutLinks: The first year of the programme is spent at Bar-Ilan University. All students from multidisciplinary backgrounds will receive essential training in neuroscience and data science tailored according to their undergraduate studies and designed to bring all students to the same level in both subjects. During this year, students will be integrated into the vibrant teaching and research environment of the Gonda Multidisciplinary Brain Research Center. The first year in Israel is mandatory for all students.

blocks.text: This will be followed by two compulsory weeks at the University of Zagreb for a tailor-made summer school programme for the NeuroData degree. The aim of the summer school is to expose students to advanced neuroscience and data science topics, enable them to present their progress and finalise a thesis mentor, meet professors and mentors from the partner universities, and to have fun and socialise.
blocks.textWithoutLinks: This will be followed by two compulsory weeks at the University of Zagreb for a tailor-made summer school programme for the NeuroData degree. The aim of the summer school is to expose students to advanced neuroscience and data science topics, enable them to present their progress and finalise a thesis mentor, meet professors and mentors from the partner universities, and to have fun and socialise.

blocks.text: Students will spend the second year at one of the four partner institutions studying their sub-specialty of choice and working on a research thesis.
blocks.textWithoutLinks: Students will spend the second year at one of the four partner institutions studying their sub-specialty of choice and working on a research thesis.

blocks.text: Study Tracks – Second-Year
blocks.textWithoutLinks: Study Tracks – Second-Year

blocks.text: Biomedical Engineering
blocks.textWithoutLinks: Biomedical Engineering

blocks.text: Instituto Superior Técnico, University of Lisbon, Portugal
blocks.textWithoutLinks: Instituto Superior Técnico, University of Lisbon, Portugal

blocks.text: This track focuses on neuroscience's biomedical and data science engineering aspects and biomedical and data science engineering applications for brain research and technologies.
blocks.textWithoutLinks: This track focuses on neuroscience's biomedical and data science engineering aspects and biomedical and data science engineering applications for brain research and technologies.

blocks.text: Cognitive Neuroscience and Clinical Neuropsychology with Data Processing
blocks.textWithoutLinks: Cognitive Neuroscience and Clinical Neuropsychology with Data Processing

blocks.text: University of Padua, Italy
blocks.textWithoutLinks: University of Padua, Italy

blocks.text: This track is designed for students with a BA in Psychology, specialising in cognitive neuroscience and data science. The curriculum focuses on basic and clinical aspects of cognitive neurosciences and data science applications in this field.
blocks.textWithoutLinks: This track is designed for students with a BA in Psychology, specialising in cognitive neuroscience and data science. The curriculum focuses on basic and clinical aspects of cognitive neurosciences and data science applications in this field.

blocks.text: Systems Neuroscience and Data Processing
blocks.textWithoutLinks: Systems Neuroscience and Data Processing

blocks.text: Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam, The Netherlands
blocks.textWithoutLinks: Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam, The Netherlands

blocks.text: This track will concentrate on systems neuroscience and data processing and provide knowledge on this field's clinical and translational applications.
blocks.textWithoutLinks: This track will concentrate on systems neuroscience and data processing and provide knowledge on this field's clinical and translational applications.

blocks.text: Cognitive Neuroscience and Neuroimaging with Data Processing
blocks.textWithoutLinks: Cognitive Neuroscience and Neuroimaging with Data Processing

blocks.text: University of Jyväskylä, Finland
blocks.textWithoutLinks: University of Jyväskylä, Finland

blocks.text: This track specialises in neuroimaging and data processing. The curriculum provides advanced knowledge in cognitive neuroscience, neuroimaging techniques, and data science-orientated data analysis and visualisation in this field.
blocks.textWithoutLinks: This track specialises in neuroimaging and data processing. The curriculum provides advanced knowledge in cognitive neuroscience, neuroimaging techniques, and data science-orientated data analysis and visualisation in this field.

blocks.text: Mobility rules for Erasmus Mundus scholarship holders.
blocks.textWithoutLinks: Mobility rules for Erasmus Mundus scholarship holders.

blocks.text: Erasmus Mundus Scholarship holders students must perform at least two mobilities in two different countries not being the country of residence at the time of enrolment.
blocks.textWithoutLinks: Erasmus Mundus Scholarship holders students must perform at least two mobilities in two different countries not being the country of residence at the time of enrolment.

blocks.text: In the NeuroData programme this implies for most students: 1st year at Bar-Ilan University; 2nd year can be spent at the University of Lisbon or at Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam, or the University of Jyväskylä or at the University of Padua.
blocks.textWithoutLinks: In the NeuroData programme this implies for most students: 1st year at Bar-Ilan University; 2nd year can be spent at the University of Lisbon or at Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam, or the University of Jyväskylä or at the University of Padua.

blocks.text: If you are a scholarship holder residing in one of the consortium countries at the time of enrolment, you must choose a specific study track in order to be eligible for the Erasmus Mundus scholarship. Below are some examples:
blocks.textWithoutLinks: If you are a scholarship holder residing in one of the consortium countries at the time of enrolment, you must choose a specific study track in order to be eligible for the Erasmus Mundus scholarship. Below are some examples:
